title: Body Fat Percentage Calculator - Free Estimate
description: Free body fat percentage calculator using the U.S. Navy method. Estimate your body fat based on measurements. Track your fitness progress accurately.
keywords: body fat percentage calculator, body fat calculator, body composition, navy method body fat, fitness calculator
intro: Estimate your body fat percentage using the U.S. Navy method. Enter your measurements below for an accurate estimate.

faq.q: How is body fat percentage calculated?
faq.a: This calculator uses the U.S. Navy method which estimates body fat from neck, waist, and hip (for women) circumference measurements along with height.

faq.q: What is a healthy body fat percentage?
faq.a: For men: 10-20% is considered fit, 20-25% average. For women: 18-28% is fit, 28-32% average.
The Navy method is accurate within 3-4% of more precise methods like DEXA scans for most people.
